title: PrefixSliceGraphV1
description: Graph-projection prefix slice (CNT-005). Model-visible learned projection derived from the raw trace prefix. Text projections use prefix-slice-text-v1.schema.json. Do NOT combine both projections in a single object. Do NOT include domain, router, prompt-template, corpus, split, or URI metadata.

trace_id.description: Stable trace identifier. Must not be empty or a placeholder.

step_id.description: Step within the trace at the prefix cutoff point.

state_graph.description: Graph-native projection of the current pipeline state at prefix cutoff. No future profile, evidence, promotion, or soundness leakage.

available_artifacts.description: List of artifact identifiers available at this prefix cutoff.

legal_action_mask.description: Subset of actions that are legal at this prefix cutoff.

gold_action.description: Gold-standard action for SFT training. ActionDSL object or null.

omission_reason.description: Why a canonical field was intentionally omitted from this derived projection.

arguments.description: Canonical ActionDSL arguments keyed by frozen argument names.

actionDsl.description: Canonical ActionDSL object shape for model-visible prefix supervision.

omissionReason.description: Why a canonical field was intentionally omitted from a derived projection.

nodes.description: Graph nodes representing claims/relations at prefix cutoff.

edges.description: Graph edges representing relations at prefix cutoff.

stateGraphV1.description: StateGraphV1 -- graph-native projection of the pipeline state at prefix cutoff.

profile_summary.description: Summary of the assurance profile at prefix cutoff. Must not contain future snapshots.

relation_type.description: Type of the relation (e.g. dependsOn, contradicts).

is_hidden_assumption.description: Whether this edge was surfaced by hidden assumption discovery.
